label: Transparent maidenhair fern motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source for final PNG cutout
Primary request: Create only a maidenhair fern frond isolated as a complete botanical cutout, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A delicate maidenhair fern frond with thin glossy black stems and many small fan-shaped light green fernlets, accurate airy branching structure, natural botanical detail, crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: Centered complete frond with generous padding, elegant curved stem silhouette, do not crop the frond.
Lighting/mood: Clean even studio light that preserves black stem detail and translucent light green fernlets.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no pot, no hand, no bouquet, no vase, no soil, no rocks, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Maidenhair Fern light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-style design-system board named Morphous Maidenhair Fern, derived from the provided maidenhair fern cutout: glossy black stems, fan-shaped light green fernlets, mist grey, shaded-grotto neutrals, and delicate navigation accents.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the maidenhair frond image. The board must visibly respect the motif colors only.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 composition.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, and generated asset examples.
Style: premium product design system board, precise grid, shadcn/tweakcn-compatible UI, delicate navigation system, 8px radii, slender black-stem dividers, airy fernlet tabs, mist-grey panels, pale grotto background, light green focus rings.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: black stems, light green fernlets, mist grey, shaded grotto neutrals, pale chlorophyll highlights, dark wet-stone ink.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no tiny illegible token tables.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Maidenhair Fern dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Maidenhair Fern design-system board. It must feel like the same delicate navigation system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the maidenhair fern motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, 8px radius, spacing, navigation patterns, and typography.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 composition.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, and generated asset examples.
Visual details: dark wet-stone and shaded-grotto background derived from black stems, mist-grey foregrounds, pale leaf green active controls, chlorophyll focus rings, subtle fernlet texture overlays, crisp shadcn/tweakcn cards and controls, slender black-stem dividers.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: black stems, light green fernlets, mist grey, shaded grotto neutrals, pale chlorophyll highlights, wet-stone ink.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black void, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny token tables.
